2605.09222.title: Detect, Localize, and Explain: Interactive Hierarchical Log Anomaly Analytics with LLM Augmentation
2605.09222.paper_summary: Logs are ubiquitous in modern systems. Unfortunately, their unstructured nature in flat sequences limits understanding of execution behaviors, hindering effective anomaly diagnosis. To address this, Krone introduces a novel hierarchical log abstraction that transforms flat log sequences into semantically coherent units across entity, action, and status levels. Building on this abstraction, Krone introduces a hierarchical orchestration framework that decomposes flat log sequences into hierarchical execution units and performs modular detection over them. It executes and optimizes the modular detection tasks across levels, enabling precise anomaly detection, localization, and explanation with selective invocation of LLM-based reasoning. In this work, we present Krone-viz, an interactive visualization system based on Krone, which makes hierarchical log analysis interpretable and actionable for software engineers and system operators. Demonstrated on the widely used HDFS benchmark dataset, Krone-viz supports: 1) examining hierarchical decompositions of flat log sequences, 2) inspecting detection results and abnormal segments identified by Krone with LLM-generated explanations, and 3) reusing, reviewing, and revising knowledge generated by LLMs with human-in-the-loop guardrails. The code of Krone-viz is available at https://github.com/LeiMa0324/KRONE_Demo_official, and we deploy a live demo at https://leima0324.github.io/KRONE_Demo_official.
2605.09222.paper_summary_zh: 日誌在現代系統中無處不在。<lb/>不幸的是，它們在平面序列中的非結構化特性限制了對執行行為的理解，妨礙了有效的異常診斷。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，Krone 引入了一種新穎的層次日誌抽象，將平面日誌序列轉換為在實體、行動和狀態層級上語義一致的單元。<lb/>基於這一抽象，Krone 引入了一個層次編排框架，將平面日誌序列分解為層次執行單元，並對它們進行模組化檢測。<lb/>它在各層級中執行和優化模組檢測任務，使得能夠精確地檢測、定位和解釋異常，並選擇性地調用基於 LLM 的推理。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們介紹了 Krone-viz，一個基於 Krone 的互動可視化系統，使層次日誌分析對軟體工程師和系統操作員來說可解釋且可行動。<lb/>在廣泛使用的 HDFS 基準數據集上演示，Krone-viz 支持：1) 檢查平面日誌序列的層次分解，2) 檢查 Krone 識別的檢測結果和異常片段，並附有 LLM 生成的解釋，以及 3) 重新使用、審查和修訂 LLM 生成的知識，並設有人類介入的防護措施。<lb/>Krone-viz 的代碼可在 https://github.com/LeiMa0324/KRONE_Demo_official 獲得，我們在 https://leima0324.github.io/KRONE_Demo_official 部署了一個實時演示。
2605.09222.author: Lei Ma et.al.
2605.09222.authors: Lei Ma, Suhani Chaudhary, Ethan Shanbaum, Athanasios Tassiadamis, Peter M. VanNostrand, Dennis M. Hofmann, Haowen Xu, Elke Rundensteiner
